title: WebSocket Connection Protocol 2 Connect Success Response
description: Message sent by the acceptor after successful WSCP handshake.

appId.title: appId
appId.description: The appId that the connection was validated against.

instanceId.title: instanceId
instanceId.description: The instance Id granted to the application by the Desktop Agent.

instanceUuid.title: instanceUuid
instanceUuid.description: Instance UUID associated with the instanceId granted, which may be used to retrieve the same instanceId on reconnection.

implementationMetadata.title: ImplementationMetadata
implementationMetadata.description: Implementation metadata for the Desktop Agent.
